name: UNITED PARCEL SERVICE INC
summary: United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS) is a global package delivery and supply chain solutions company. It operates through three segments: U.S. Domestic Package, International Package, and Supply Chain Solutions. UPS provides time-definite delivery services for packages and documents, freight transportation, logistics, and related services to customers worldwide, serving individual consumers and businesses across a broad range of industries.
